word: G589 - ἀποδημέω - apodēméō - ap-od-ay-meh'-o - Go into a far country

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἀποδημέω

- Transliteration: Apodemeo

- Phonetic: ap-od-ay-meh'-o

- Definition:

1. to go away into foreign parts, go abroad

- Origin: from G590

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G590; to go abroad that is visit a foreign land: - go (travel) into a far country journey.
